data.name: OleDbDeleteCommand1.CommandText
data.value: DELETE FROM aEmirAjanda WHERE (ID = ?) AND (AllDay = ? OR ? IS NULL AND AllDay IS NULL) AND (EndTime = ? OR ? IS NULL AND EndTime IS NULL) AND (EventType = ? OR ? IS NULL AND EventType IS NULL) AND (FirmaNo = ? OR ? IS NULL AND FirmaNo IS NULL) AND (Label = ? OR ? IS NULL AND Label IS NULL) AND (Location = ? OR ? IS NULL AND Location IS NULL) AND (PersonelNo = ? OR ? IS NULL AND PersonelNo IS NULL) AND (StartTime = ? OR ? IS NULL AND StartTime IS NULL) AND (Status = ? OR ? IS NULL AND Status IS NULL) AND (Subject = ? OR ? IS NULL AND Subject IS NULL)

data.name: con.ConnectionString
data.value: User ID=sa;Data Source="192.168.0.1";Tag with column collation when possible=False;Initial Catalog=UGURLU;Use Procedure for Prepare=1;Auto Translate=True;Persist Security Info=False;Provider="SQLOLEDB.1";Workstation ID=SERVERR;Use Encryption for Data=False;Packet Size=4096

data.name: OleDbInsertCommand1.CommandText
data.value: INSERT INTO aEmirAjanda(FirmaNo, PersonelNo, Status, Subject, Description, Label, StartTime, EndTime, Location, AllDay, EventType, RecurrenceInfo, ReminderInfo) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?); SELECT ID, FirmaNo, PersonelNo, Status, Subject, Description, Label, StartTime, EndTime, Location, AllDay, EventType, RecurrenceInfo, ReminderInfo FROM aEmirAjanda WHERE (ID = @@IDENTITY)

data.name: OleDbSelectCommand1.CommandText
data.value: SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED SELECT ID, FirmaNo, PersonelNo, Status, Subject, Description, Label, StartTime, EndTime, Location, AllDay, EventType, RecurrenceInfo, ReminderInfo FROM aEmirAjanda

data.name: OleDbUpdateCommand1.CommandText
data.value: UPDATE aEmirAjanda SET FirmaNo = ?, PersonelNo = ?, Status = ?, Subject = ?, Description = ?, Label = ?, StartTime = ?, EndTime = ?, Location = ?, AllDay = ?, EventType = ?, RecurrenceInfo = ?, ReminderInfo = ? WHERE (ID = ?) AND (AllDay = ? OR ? IS NULL AND AllDay IS NULL) AND (EndTime = ? OR ? IS NULL AND EndTime IS NULL) AND (EventType = ? OR ? IS NULL AND EventType IS NULL) AND (FirmaNo = ? OR ? IS NULL AND FirmaNo IS NULL) AND (Label = ? OR ? IS NULL AND Label IS NULL) AND (Location = ? OR ? IS NULL AND Location IS NULL) AND (PersonelNo = ? OR ? IS NULL AND PersonelNo IS NULL) AND (StartTime = ? OR ? IS NULL AND StartTime IS NULL) AND (Status = ? OR ? IS NULL AND Status IS NULL) AND (Subject = ? OR ? IS NULL AND Subject IS NULL); SELECT ID, FirmaNo, PersonelNo, Status, Subject, Description, Label, StartTime, EndTime, Location, AllDay, EventType, RecurrenceInfo, ReminderInfo FROM aEmirAjanda WHERE (ID = ?)
